notes: 2026-06-11 GPU1 h120 loop6 all-loop scale test: clean 12x12 FutureSeed+loop source 8ccc4a9, D256/L12/loop6, LOOP_LOSS=all, h120 curriculum 16-36:200,36-60:300,60-72:500,72-84:1200,84-96:1800,96-108:1800,108-120:1600, batch72/eval512/bfloat16 on GPU1 A100 80GB after AIStation restart. Loop curve at h120: loop1/3/4/5/6 exact=0.0000/0.0117/0.0273/0.0273/0.0273; loop6 adds blank_acc but exact saturates after loop4. Insight: loop6+all-loop strongly consolidates h96/h108 and opens h120 from zero, but h120 remains a real frontier because final local accuracy is only 0.5866 and loop gains saturate early. The limiting factor is hard-stage learning/capacity/state dynamics, not selector search. K1 oracle gap is zero. Decision: treat h120 as barely opened, h108 as strongly supported by this route; next high-ROI work should target h120 stage compute/capacity or a simple FutureSeed state update, not rollout selector or Sudoku repair.
